description.value:
### Hit Die
d10.

### Starting Wealth
5d6 × 10 gp (average 175 gp).

### Skill Ranks per Level
4 + Int modifier.

### Alignment
any.

### Class Features
A cavalier swears himself to an order and rides a loyal mount into battle, issuing challenges and rallying allies. Choose one order at 1st level (Cockatrice, Dragon, Lion, Shield, Star, or Sword). See the level table below.

value: L1: Challenge 1/day — Swift action; +1 damage/level vs. one target, -2 AC vs. others. +1/day every 3 levels (max 7/day at 19th).
L1: Mount — Loyal steed functioning as a druid animal companion using cavalier level as effective druid level.

L1: Order — Choose one: Order of the Cockatrice (self-interest, Dazzling Display), Order of the Dragon (loyalty to companions, aid another), Order of the Lion (loyalty to a sovereign, challenge bonuses near allies), Order of the Shield (protect the common folk, vs. challenged-target damage), Order of the Star (faith/religion, save bonuses), or Order of the Sword (chivalry/honor, mounted challenge bonus). Grants order skills, edicts, and challenge benefit.
L1: Tactician — Grant a teamwork feat you know to all allies within 30 ft for a number of rounds; 1/day, +1/day at 11th and every 6 levels after.
L2: Order Ability — Gain your order's 2nd-level ability.
L3: Cavalier's Charge — +4 to melee attack on a charge (instead of +2); no AC penalty for charging.
L4: Expert Trainer — +1/2 cavalier level on Handle Animal and Ride for your mount; train mount in 1/7 the normal time.
L5: Banner — While displayed, allies within 60 ft who can see it get +2 vs. fear and +1 on charge attack rolls; improves with level.
L6: Bonus Feat — Bonus combat feat.
L8: Order Ability — Gain your order's 8th-level ability.
L9: Greater Tactician — Gain a bonus teamwork feat; grant it via Tactician to allies; can use Tactician as a move action.
L11: Mighty Charge — Double threat range on a charge; may make a free combat maneuver (bull rush/disarm/sunder/trip) without provoking on a charge.
L12: Bonus Feat — Bonus combat feat.
L12: Demanding Challenge — Challenged target takes -2 AC against everyone except the cavalier.
L14: Greater Banner — Allies within range may reroll a save vs. fear/charm; rallying flag rallies routed allies as a standard action.
L15: Order Ability — Gain your order's 15th-level ability.
L17: Master Tactician — Grant two teamwork feats with a single use of Tactician; Greater Tactician as a swift action.
L18: Bonus Feat — Bonus combat feat.
L20: Supreme Charge — Charge attacks deal double damage (triple with a lance); a creature damaged by the charge must save or be stunned 1d4 rounds (knocked prone on success).
